title: ballota sordida
intro: Ballota sordida, also known as bitter pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its essential oil, which contains pulegone, a compound with antiseptic and insecticidal properties. The health benefits of Ballota sordida include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural insect repellent. The herbal preparations of Ballota sordida include teas, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used topically or added to skincare products for its antiseptic and antifungal properties.
